text: The app just crashes when I try to upload a file, no error msg or anything.
I ordered a phone case a week ago, but my dog just chewed up the box it came in. The case was supposed to be red. What gives? The delivery was slow too.
I thought my subscription was canceled, but I keep getting charged! Can someone explain how this works? Ugh, it's so confusing.
Hey, I think I need a refund, but not sure what to do next. The item I ordered seems wrong. Can you help?

I've been trying to get support for a billing issue for a couple of weeks now, but every time I call, I just get placed on hold. It's really disappointing because I thought your service was excellent, but this lack of communication is frustrating.
I thought I ordered a blue shirt but I got a red one. I mean, can I send it back? I just need the blue one back. Just to be clear, not a red shirt, please.

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction regarding the lack of timely updates on my recent issue. It has been quite some time since I reported it, and the silence is frankly disheartening, especially after being assured that my concerns would be prioritized. Furthermore, the intricacies surrounding such a delay are concerning, and I hope to receive a satisfactory explanation soon.
I am experiencing an issue with the application not loading properly on my device, but I'm not sure what the specific error message is. Can you assist me with this?
I've been trying to use your app for hours, but it just crashes every time I open it. It's really upsetting because I need it for work, but I don't know what's going wrong. Can anyone help?
I can't access my account. It says locked but no reason given. What do I do now?
I tried to log in, but it says my account doesn't exist, even though I just updated my details last week. Help?
Hey, I can’t log in. I thought I changed my username but idk, not working. Help?

I regret to inform you that I am unable to access my account due to some technicalities I encountered after updating my credentials. Can you assist me in resolving this issue at your earliest convenience? Thank you.

I’ve been having issues with my service for quite a while now. I mean, it’s just not working when I need it to, and I really can’t afford to be without it, especially with all the things going on, you know? Plus, I had to explain this to your support team multiple times. It feels like I’m going in circles, and nothing gets resolved! It’s also weird that I received an email asking about my feedback on the service but it seems like no one is actually reading the responses. Can someone please look into this and help? Thank you.

Hey there! I was just trying to log in to my account, but it's acting all weird, and I think it should be working because I just saw a notification about the new features you launched last week, but now I can't even get my account page to load! Plus, I recently changed my email for some promo codes and I'm not sure if that’s affecting my access? It's kinda confusing, and I’m also wondering if my favorite cat video I uploaded last month is still there. Can you help me figure this out?

I was just wondering if there might be any future plans for offering a self-hosted solution instead of only relying on cloud services. It would be great to know if that could be an option sometime down the line!
